title: Zermatt, Valais — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Zermatt, Valais: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Zermatt is a city in Valais with a population of 6,000. A car-free Alpine resort at the foot of the iconic Matterhorn, one of the world’s most famous ski destinations with year-round glacier skiing and luxury hotels.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
